task: Can you help me make a simple checklist for getting ready for school tomorrow? I want it to be easy to follow tonight so I don’t forget anything in the morning.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple night-before school checklist:

### Tonight
- [ ] Finish homework
- [ ] Pack backpack
- [ ] Put in folders / papers
- [ ] Charge device if needed
- [ ] Set out clothes
- [ ] Pack lunch / snacks if needed
- [ ] Fill water bottle
- [ ] Set alarm
- [ ] Put shoes / jacket by the door

### Morning
- [ ] Get dressed
- [ ] Eat breakfast
- [ ] Grab backpack
- [ ] Grab water bottle / lunch
- [ ] Go to school

If you want, I can make this even shorter and more “tiny checklist” style for quick scanning.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It’s simple and easy to follow. I like the night and morning parts. The tiny checklist version would be good too, but this is already fine.
